title: Delicate Filipino Shrimp Lumpia
description: A romantic Filipino dish featuring charred and tender shrimp, this whole30-friendly lumpia is a perfect snack for any occasion, made with fresh shrimp and wrapped in a delicate lumpia wrapper.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine shrimp, garlic, onion, salt, black pepper, and patis, and mix well.
Lay a lumpia wrapper on a flat surface and place about 1 tablespoon of the shrimp mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Brush the edges of the wrapper with coconut oil and fold the wrapper into a triangle, sealing the filling inside.
Repeat the process with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Heat about 2 inches of coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few of the lumpia to the skillet and fry until they are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the lumpia from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the lumpia hot and enjoy.
